title: philibertia peduncularis
intro: Philibertia peduncularis, also known as the 'Ergot' plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's ergine alkaloids have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as pain relief and as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of Philibertia peduncularis include its potential in alleviating menstrual cramps, relieving migraines, and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's alkaloids are often extracted and used in the form of tinctures or infusions, although the use of ergot alkaloids should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
